paths.name: Lawyer
paths.hook: Provide legal counsel, represent clients, and navigate the justice system.

paths.name: CDS (Combined Defence Services)
paths.hook: Graduate-level entry to Indian military academies for elite armed forces leadership roles.

paths.name: CAPF (Central Armed Police Forces)
paths.hook: Become an Assistant Commandant leading BSF, CRPF, CISF, ITBP, and SSB battalions.

paths.name: वकील (Advocate / Lawyer)
paths.hook: Provide expert legal defense, navigate corporate law, and represent clients in courts of justice.

paths.name: Autonomous Fleet Command Officer
paths.hook: Monitor, route, and troubleshoot nationwide networks of fully autonomous long-haul electric freight truck fleets via satellite mission control.

paths.name: Autonomous Fleet Control Officer
paths.hook: Monitor satellite mission control command desks to route and troubleshoot nationwide networks of fully autonomous electric freight trucks.

paths.name: BPSC State Civil Services
paths.hook: Prestigious state administrative and executive cadre leading major developmental projects and civil governance across Bihar.

paths.name: SSC CGL Officer
paths.hook: Central government administrative posts spanning customs, income tax inspector cadres, and central secretariat governance.

paths.name: CDS Commissioned Officer
paths.hook: Combined Defence Services leadership pathway for direct appointment of elite tactical commanders across military academies.

paths.name: Indian Army Infantry Officer
paths.hook: Elite ground troop tactical leadership defending strategic borders, counter-insurgency grids, and high-altitude battlefields.

paths.name: BSF Border Defense Commander
paths.hook: First line of national defense managing international territorial border security and cross-border tactical infiltration grids.

paths.name: IB ACIO Intelligence Officer
paths.hook: Intelligence Bureau executive operatives gathering critical counter-terrorism and internal security human intelligence.

paths.name: CBI Investigative Officer
paths.hook: Central Bureau of Investigation premier detectives investigating complex economic crimes and national security cases.

paths.name: Bank PO (Probationary Officer)

paths.name: LIC AAO (Assistant Administrative Officer)
paths.hook: Life Insurance Corporation executive operations underwriting multi-million dollar insurance policies and pension assets.

paths.name: Supreme Court Constitutional Lawyer
paths.hook: Arguing high-stakes constitutional legal challenges, drafting corporate contracts, and defending corporate litigation.

paths.name: High Court District Judge
paths.hook: Adjudicating complex civil and criminal litigation, interpreting constitutional law, and delivering binding sovereign legal verdicts.
